message:
test(bintree): expand from 2 to 46 tests for zipper binary tree (wa-1nzsr)

Cover Tree construction/emptiness, Cursor navigation (go_left/go_right/
go_up errors and position queries), leaf_mut/node_mut mutation, unsplit_leaf,
split_node_and_insert_left/right, path_to_root, postorder traversal, subtree,
go_to_nth_leaf, Debug/PartialEq impls, and PathBranch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
